titleStmt.title: SII 20.5: original edition by G. S. Gai
No. 5. (B.K. No. 34 of 1935-36.) LAKSHMĒŚVAR, SHIRHATTI TALUK, DHARWAR DISTRICT.

p.hi: On a slab built into the right wall of the Śaṁkha-basti at Basti-Baṇa.

summary.p: This is dated in Śaka 645, the 28th regnal year of the king, Bhādrapada, Paurṇimā, lunar eclipse, corresponding to A.D. 723, August 20, which was a Friday.

It records the gift of the village of Seṁboḷal, to the temple of Jina-Bhaṭṭāraka at Purikara-nagara by Bikki Rāṇaka, at the request of a certain Vijaya, son of Drōṇamma. The gift was made over to Jayadēva-paṇḍitāchārya of Mūla-saṁgha. The gift village is said to have been situated to the south of Purikara-nagara.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
bhuvanaṁ vapuḥ . śrīmatāṁ sakaḷa
trāṇāṁ hārītiputrāṇāṁ paptalōkamātṛbhira
parirakṣaṇaprāptakalyāṇaparaṁparāṇāṁ bhagavannārāyaṇa prasādasamāsādita
lāṁchanakṣaṇēkṣaṇavaśīkṛtāśēṣamahinabhṛtāṁ caḷukyānāṁ kuḷamaḷaṁkariṣṇōraśvamēdhāvabhṛthasnānapavitrīkṛta
śrīpolakēśivallabhamahārājasya sūnuḥ parākramākrāntavanavāsyādiparanṛpatimaṇdaḷapraṇibaddhaviśu
śrīkīrttivarmmaprithvīvallabhamahārājastasyātmajaḥ samarasaṁsaktasakaḷōttarāpathēśvaraśrīharṣavarddhanaparājayōpātta
sya satyāśrayaśrīprithvīvallabhamahārājādhirājaparamēśvarasya priyatanayasya prajñātanayasya khaḍgamātra
sahāyasya citrakaṇṭhābhidhānapravaraturaṅgamēṇaikēnai śēṣavijagīṣōravanipatitṛtayāṁtaritāṁ svagurōśraya
prabhāvakuḷiśadaḷitapāṇḍyacōḷakēraḷa vibhramasyānanyāvanatakāṁcīpatima
kuṭacuṁbitapādāṁbujasya vikramādityasatyāśrayaśrīpṛthvīvallabhamahārājādhirājaparamēśvaraparamabhaṭṭārakasya priya
tanayaḥ piturājñayā bāḷēṁduśēkharasya tārakārātiriva daityabaḷa trairājyakāṁcīpatibaḷamavaṣṭabhya karadī
kutakamērapārasikasiṁhaḷādidvīpādhipasya sakaḷōttarāpatha pāḷidhvajādi pāramaiśvaryacihna
sya satyāśrayaśrīprithvīvallabhamahārājādhirāja śaiśava yēvā
dhiga tāstrō dakṣiṇāśāvijayini pitāmahē samu ruttarāpathavijigīṣōrggurōra
vāhavavyāpāramācarannarātigajaghaṭāpāṭanaviśīryyamāṇakṛpāṇadhārasamagravigrahāgrēsarasatsāhasarasi
taśatrumaṁḍaḷō gaṁgāyamunāpāḷidhvajapaṭaḍhakkāma hāśabdacihnamāṇikyamataṁgajādīṁ pitṛsātkurvan paraiḥ
rāsādya kathamapi vidhivaśādapanītōpi pratāpādēva viśaya prakōpamarājakamutsārayanvatsarāja yivāna
pēkṣitāparasahāyakaḥ tadavagrahānnirggatya svabhujāvaṣṭaṁbhap�sādhitāśēṣaviśvaṁbharaḥ prabhurakhaṇḍitaśaktitrayatvācchatrumadabhaṁ
janatvādudāratvānniravadyatvādyassamastabhuvanāśrayassakaḷapāramaiśvaryabyaktihētu pāḷidhvajādyujvaḷaprājyarājyō
vijayādityasatyāśraya śrīpṛthvīvallabhamahārājādhirājaparamēśvarabhaṭṭārakassarvvānēvamājñāpayati viditamastu vōsmā
bhiḥ paṁcacatvāriṁśaduttaraṣaṭchatēṣu sakavarṣēṣvatītēṣu pravarddhamānavijayarājyasaṁvatsarē Aṣṭaviṁśē varttamānē śrīraktapuramadhiva
sati vijayaskaṁdhāvārē bhādrapada paurṇnamāsyāṁ sarvvagrāsacaṁdragrahaṇōpalakṣitāyāṁ śrī mūlasaṁghānvaya pravarttaka
śrīdēvācāryyastasya śiṣyō cikaṇadēvācārya tatsiśyō rāmadēvācāryyastasya dharmatanayō jayadēvapaṁḍitācā
ryyastannimittaṁ nānānṛpakuḷapradhānabhūtāguṇavaṁśōtpannō drōṇamma nāmadhēyastasya sūnuḥ saddharmmanāmā tatu
priyatanayasya vijayanāmnō sumahattarasya vijñāpanayā śrībikkirāṇakēna purikaranagarē śrīśaṁkhajinālayāṁtarvvartti ya
tkāritaṁ śrījinabhaṭṭārakāyatanaṁ tasyāyatanasya khaṇḍasphuṭitadānaśālānimittaṁ taṁ nagarāddakṣiṇasyāṁ diśi seṁboḷalanā
magrāmaṁ sarvvabādhāparihāraṁ dadau . tasya khyāyatē . pūrvvasyāṁ diśi nāgataṭākaṁ . pūrvvadakṣiṇasyāṁ diśi diṁḍī
bhadattapūrvvasamīpavartti kriṣṇapāṣā tasmātpaścimasyāṁ diśi khaṁpajātaḥ tanmācōttara diśi nadīnirjjharapūrvvamukhangataśvētakūpaṁ jaṁbūdrumānkasaramThekhaṁpajātaḥ tasmācōttara are inserted below the line in small letters with a cross marked here showing their correct place in the line.
yāvatu nāgataṭākaṁ . svaṁ dātuṁ sumahacchakyaṁ duṣṭamanyasyapāḷanaṁ dānātpāḷanāccēti dānācchrēyōnpāḷanaṁ .
Digital edition of SII 20.5 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
